Pricing

Pricing that turns evaluation into subscription

Choose a plan, compare monthly and yearly pricing, understand your license scope and move directly into purchase, trial or app download.

starter

Starter

Tek sube ile lisansli POS ekosistemine kontrollu gecis.

₺1.490

Aylik faturalama

  • 1 sube
  • 1 POS / cihaz
  • 3 personel
  • Standart onboarding + email destek
CheckoutDownload

pro

Pro

Birden cok sube, saha ve bayi odakli perakende ekipleri icin ana ticari paket.

₺2.990

Aylik faturalama

  • 5 sube
  • 5 POS / cihaz
  • 10 personel
  • Oncelikli destek + aktivasyon rehberligi
CheckoutDownload

enterprise

Enterprise

Kurumsal markalar, zincir yapilar ve ozellestirilmis rollout gereksinimleri icin.

₺5.990

Aylik faturalama

  • Sinirsiz veya sozlesmeli
  • Sinirsiz veya sozlesmeli
  • Sinirsiz veya sozlesmeli

Trust badges

What happens after purchase

A customer account is created, the subscription is activated, the license becomes visible and the download path is ready for Desktop and Mobile.

License explanation

License rules stay readable

Every plan explains device, branch and user scope clearly. Enforcement happens during activation in the apps, not on the website.

Plan summary

A clean commercial comparison layer

Pricing cards help buyers self-qualify before they move into checkout, demo or reseller conversation.

starter

Starter

Tek sube ile lisansli POS ekosistemine kontrollu gecis.

Monthly 1490 TRY · Yearly 14900 TRY

Pro

Monthly 2990 TRY · Yearly 29900 TRY

enterprise

Enterprise

Kurumsal markalar, zincir yapilar ve ozellestirilmis rollout gereksinimleri icin.

Monthly 5990 TRY · Yearly 59900 TRY

FAQ

Pricing questions

Addressing commercial objections directly improves conversion confidence.

Aylik ve yillik planlar arasindaki temel fark nedir?

Teknik kapsam aynidir; fark faturalama periyodu, yenileme tarihi ve yillik odeme avantajidir.

Satin alma tamamlaninca ne olur?

Musteri hesabi, tenant kaydi, abonelik, lisans kaydi ve indirme erisimi olusur; sonrasinda Desktop veya Mobile aktivasyon adimlari izlenir.

Web sitesi uzerinden satis veya stok islemi yapabilir miyim?

Hayir. Web katmani sadece tanitim, lisans, checkout, indirme ve portal yonetimi icindir.

LoomaPOS

The website is the growth and acquisition layer for LoomaPOS. It explains the product, drives subscriptions, supports downloads and routes visitors to the correct portal without ever acting like a live POS interface.
